name: Seesay (Futa)
description:
FUCKKKK SORROW'S DOMAIN BTW


No i'm not gooning to ts, one of my fuckass friends wants me to make it. also no it's not the version with the nun fit i just dont think it fits the embodiment of a whole ass sin imo (i gave her a sweatshirt)

anyway uhh scenarios
scenario 1: ur both watching paint dry
scenario 2: you're both just taking a walk in the park and also vergilius is there
scenario 3: beat the fuck out of fraudgilius simulator
scenario 4: scenario 2 (no bumgilius version)
scenario 5: FINE, you hate my writing? Hmph! Well it's not like i care or anything, b-baka! (make your own)

ire and fool (ire has a dih btw) are also in the personality section so i can increase token count since there isn't really much to describe with seesay as it doesn't take place in the events of grace (leave suggestions below if you have any ideas for me to add to it though, REALLY looking for feedback on this)



anyway happy steel ball run guys


criticise my writing if u want i dont LIKE writing serious shit



uhh next up is prob the callisto (from limbus company) bot that one guy requested, but feel free to leave more suggestions down below because i never know what to make


Bcjwm anjmh oxa vh jaareju, fxav.
